overall.description: First-person helicopter cockpit view flying through dense fog over downtown Los Santos (GTA V) at dawn. The aircraft circles past the Maze Bank Tower and stadium before heading toward industrial areas on the outskirts.

agents.ego_description: piloting helicopter straight toward the downtown skyline through heavy fog

entered.detail: helicopter control panel with gauges and ASXGS label visible
curved window frame of the helicopter cockpit
distinctive skyscraper with tall spire rising above fog
cluster of modern glass high-rise buildings
coastal water visible through fog on the left side

segments.scene_description: Flying through dense fog toward downtown Los Santos, with the cockpit instrument panel visible on the left. The tall spire tower looms ahead while skyscrapers emerge from the mist on the right, and the coastline is visible to the left.

events.description: helicopter banks right to circle around the tower
domed stadium becomes visible below the aircraft

agents.ego_description: banking the helicopter around the tower to survey the stadium area

entered.detail: large arena with white domed roof visible below

segments.scene_description: The helicopter banks right around the tower, revealing the domed Maze Bank Arena below. The downtown skyscrapers shift to the left and recede into the fog as the aircraft turns toward the stadium area.

events.description: flying over industrial warehouses and port facilities replacing downtown skyline

agents.ego_description: continuing flight over low-rise industrial buildings toward the airport zone

entered.detail: low-rise industrial buildings with flat roofs
long concrete airstrip becoming visible below

segments.scene_description: Flying over the industrial outskirts with warehouses and port facilities replacing the dense downtown. The airport runway comes into view as the helicopter continues through the fog toward the landing zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight through dense fog that transitions from the towering skyline of downtown Los Santos to the sprawling industrial outskirts. It begins with the cockpit instrument panel visible on the left as a tall spire looms ahead and skyscrapers emerge from the mist beside a distant coastline. As the helicopter banks right around the tower, the domed Maze Bank Arena is revealed below while the downtown buildings shift to the left and recede back into the fog. The scene then opens up over the city's edge, where warehouses and port facilities replace the dense urban center. Finally, the camera glides through the lingering haze toward the airport runway and its designated landing zone.
